summary: Plan-only classification: keep #92391 as the canonical open bug report and keep #92594 as the related contributor PR candidate for that issue. No close, merge, fix, or security-routing action is planned.

actions.reason: The representative remains open, hydrated, and contains the clearest user-visible failure and reproduction for this root cause.

This is useful contributor work tied to the canonical issue, but it is not merge-planned in this cluster because merge is blocked by job policy and the compatibility/auth-provider review gate remains maintainer-facing.
